title: Extract shared guideline-voting engine for contradiction/alignment analysis

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. First deliverable is extracting DRY per-item guideline voting into a reusable service used by both contradictions and aligned report modes, with strict dataset eligibility=unanimous non-contradiction.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: extracted shared guideline-vetting voting engine to plexus/reports/blocks/guideline_vetting.py with per-item verdict/confidence/vote traces and strict reference eligibility (unanimous non-contradiction). Added unit tests in guideline_vetting_test.py.
